content.en:
"This is the Void Treasure Land of the Ancient Heavenly Palace!"

Ye Tian's reincarnation golden worm copied his body and came here, he mainly came to see if there was anything wrong with the Void Mist Ancient Turtle here.

But.

When he came here, he found that the Reincarnation Golden Worm did not besiege the Void Mist Ancient Turtle, and the Void Mist Ancient Turtle was still asleep and was not attacked by the Reincarnation Golden Worm.

"The Reincarnation Golden Worm didn't attack the Void Mist Ancient Turtle, it seems that it was only targeting the Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Land of Eternity!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But if you think about it carefully, if the reincarnation gold worm wants to kill all the creatures in the ruins of reincarnation, then it can be killed a long time ago, after all, there are too many reincarnation gold worms, even if there are more creatures in the ruins of reincarnation, but they can't beat the reincarnation gold worms!

The weakest reincarnation golden insects are all comparable to the Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and most of the reincarnation ruin creatures are only equivalent to the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

It is precisely because the reincarnation golden worm has no killing intent towards other creatures in the ruins of reincarnation that it will not kill.

However, the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of the Land of Eternity is easy to target.

The years passed.

Ye Tian frantically refined the origin of the reincarnation golden worm one by one, although he had now reached the bottleneck, the body of reincarnation Haotian and the origin of reincarnation of Haotian had reached the limit of the second balance, and there was no way to continue to improve.

However, the reincarnation of the Golden Worm Origin still has the effect of faintly increasing the will of the Origin Realm, and if you refine it more, you can still improve it a little, and the efficiency of refining the Origin of the Reincarnation Golden Worm is very fast, anyway, it is many times faster than slowly improving the will of the Origin Realm.

this day.

Ye Tian found that there were a lot of reincarnation golden insects asking for help, and the locations were all at one node, this node was a little special, a large number of reincarnation golden insects were rushing there, there were too many of them.

"So many reincarnation golden insects are going to support, could it be that there are a lot of Origin Upper Realm overlords there who are frantically slaughtering reincarnation golden insects?"

Ye Tian wondered.

He immediately went over to take a look.

And when he shuttled past, he sensed an instinctive joy, as if he had returned home.

Soon.

He came to this point, only to find that this did not seem to be the ruins of reincarnation, but a lair.

"The Lair of the Reincarnation Golden Worm !!"

Ye Tian didn't expect to come here.

At this time.

This nest is densely covered with a large number of reincarnation golden worms, and they are fighting against a group of Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

Among them, the desolate ancestor is here.

......

"Hahaha, I didn't expect to be so lucky this time, and I found the nest of the reincarnation gold worm so quickly!"

Arazu said excitedly.

Zhenzu said: "The reincarnation of the golden worm is coming back, the number is increasing, let's hurry up and snatch the reincarnation real liquid!"

The Reincarnation True Liquid was the goal of these Ancient Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and as long as they snatched some of the Reincarnation True Liquid, it was worth it.

The effect of the true liquid of reincarnation is very large, it helps to break through the realm, and it can also be used to save life.

It is almost impossible for the Origin Upper Realm Overlords like them, who have awakened seven or eight times or broken the Origin Boundary of the other side seven or eight times, to continue to break through, and they must find another way, and it is easy to die violently in the process of research.

And if they take the true liquid of reincarnation, they will not die, and they will not have many sequelae.

If there was no reincarnation true liquid, even if they were immortal, they would not have any hope of breaking through in the future, and they would even fall into the realm.

In the era of the Origin Ancestor, the Origin Ancestor was able to break through to the level of nine awakenings, that is, he obtained a large amount of reincarnation true liquid, and finally collected countless reincarnation true liquids to impact a higher realm, although he failed, and the reincarnation true liquid did not save his life, but at least the body of the Origin Ancestor broke through in half a step, and turned into a treasure land.

It can be said that there is also the effect of reincarnation true liquid, otherwise the corpse of the origin ancestor may not be saved, and it may turn into ashes.

If they want to break through to the level of the Origin Ancestor, the reincarnation true liquid is indispensable.

At this time.

Desolate Ancestor and Zhenzu have fought with many reincarnation golden insects, many of which are comparable to their reincarnation golden insects.

If the time drags on for a long time, the Desolate Ancestor may have to fall.

Ye Tian watched their battle and hid far away, not even daring to bear the aftermath, otherwise he would be killed directly!

Soon.

The Desolate Ancestor and they killed a place in the center of the reincarnation golden worm's nest, where trees grew, and after the Desolate Ancestor killed here, they grabbed these trees.

Rumble!!!

A tree was torn apart, diffusing drops of golden liquid that exuded a special energy.

And the Wild Ancestor is snatching these golden liquids, and they are also competing with each other to snatch them, and they have no idea of cooperation at all.

Wow!

The Desolate Ancestor grabbed some of the reincarnation true liquid and ran away directly, ignoring the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords at all.

Of course.

The same is true for the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords, they are not greedy, otherwise they will be surrounded by a large number of reincarnation golden worms, and their lives will also be in danger.

It's only one life for them, and they don't want to lose it here!

Soon.

They all fled, and each of them was not lightly injured.

After all, just when they were snatching the reincarnation true liquid, there were already more reincarnation golden worms comparable to the eight awakenings coming to support, and the number even exceeded that of the desolate ancestors, so they naturally left at the cost of being injured.

It can even be said that if it is a little later, at least a few Origin Upper Realm Overlords will have to die.

......

"What kind of treasure did they rob of the Wild Ancestor?"

Ye Tian was curious.

He did not leave this reincarnation gold worm nest, but flew over after many reincarnation gold bugs left.

Of course.

There are still some reincarnation gold worms stationed in this reincarnation golden worm nest, and they did not choose to leave.

Then.

Ye Tian found that this reincarnation golden worm's nest was moving, deviating from the original coordinates, if it weren't for the fact that his replica body was still in the nest, it would really not be easy to find, unless the nest called him, he could sense it and return.

"Reincarnation of the Golden Worm, the Reincarnation of the Golden Worm's Nest, there are more and more secrets of the ruins of reincarnation!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Next to the trees.

The other reincarnation golden insects did not prevent Ye Tian from approaching, after all, Ye Tian was now a reincarnation golden insect replicating body, and he was not the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, so he would naturally not be blocked.

It just so happened that there was still scattered reincarnation true liquid here, and Ye Tian directly put it away.

"Desolate ancestors, they are desperately trying to snatch this treasure, but I can easily collect it, if they know, I'm afraid they will have to die of envy!"

Soon, he put away all the scattered reincarnation true liquid.
